theme.description: A high-end, authority-driven aesthetic that leverages radical stark contrasts. In light mode, it feels like a crisp editorial magazine or premium corporate document. In dark mode, it transitions to a sleek, modern 'Godly' digital agency showcase with glowing accents and deep blacks.

surfaces.cards: bg-card text-card-foreground border border-border shadow-sm rounded-none sm:rounded-lg
surfaces.bento_grid: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 md:gap-6

marketing_pages.hero_section: Generous spacing. Overlapping elements. Overlay opacity max bg-black/40. Left-aligned heavy typography with electric primary action button.
marketing_pages.services_carousel: Use bento grid mode. 'Tetris' style with col-span-2 or col-span-1 variations. Hover states MUST have a slight lift (-translate-y-1) and primary border color change.
marketing_pages.portfolio_gallery: Masonry or Bento grid structure. Images must not exceed 80vh on mobile. Hover reveals project details with glassmorphism overlay.
marketing_pages.contact_form: Shadcn highly customized. Inputs have 1px solid border, subtle focus ring. Two-column layout on desktop: Text/Address on left, Form on right.

admin_dashboard.layout: Grid-based. Dense and compact spacing (p-4 or p-6). Cardless or 1px border flat cards.
admin_dashboard.navigation: Sidebar or top nav with clear visual hierarchy. Use Phosphor Icons or Lucide.
admin_dashboard.tables_and_stats: Use Shadcn Table and Chart components. Minimalist styling, pure function.

interactive_rules.hover_states: Always explicitly define hover text colors. Example: hover:bg-primary/90 hover:text-primary-foreground
interactive_rules.animations: Use staggered entrance animations for lists/grids via framer-motion.
interactive_rules.data_testid: MANDATORY on all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links).

hero_dark.description: Abstract 3D digital architecture for Dark Theme Hero

hero_light.description: Minimalist frosted glass abstraction for Light Theme Hero

services_tech.description: Macro shot of modern laptop keyboard on concrete desk for Services section

office_about.description: Modern open-plan office for About Us or Agency Culture section

meeting_presentation.description: Business meeting for Contact or Quote Request section

software_abstract.description: Abstract software code screen for Portfolio/Features

instructions_to_main_agent: DO NOT use Inter or standard sans for headings. Apply 'Outfit' globally to headings via CSS variables.
Implement a robust Dark/Light mode toggle system in the Next/React layout using next-themes.
Ensure the Admin panel shares the theme but defaults to a denser, more functional grid (Control Room grid mode).
Hero sections MUST have max bg-black/40 overlay. Do not hide the premium generated hero images under thick layers.
Implement 'data-testid' on every button, link, and form input for testing.
Utilize framer-motion for subtle entrance reveals on the frontend (Services bento grid, Portfolio masonry).
